caption: The video features a man playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery and a red pendant. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a cozy or intimate venue. The man's focused expression and the way he holds the guitar indicate that he is deeply engaged in his performance. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems attentive, adding to the atmosphere of a live music event. The logo "ORCA" in the bottom right corner suggests that this performance might be part of a specific event or organization associated with that name.
